text
Maria buys granola bars that come in boxes of 12 bars per box, with each bar containing 90 calories. If Maria has already eaten 3 bars, the remaining bars in the box are 12 - 3 = 9 bars. The total calories in the box are 9 * 90 = 810 calories. The remaining calories in the box are 810 calories. piece
